## 📋 Pull Request

### What does this PR do?
<!-- Describe the change clearly in 1-3 sentences -->

### Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / chore
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement

### Testing
- [ ] I've tested this locally
- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Tested on mobile

### Before merging
- [ ] Preview URL reviewed and looks correct
- [ ] Lighthouse scores are green (check PR comments)
- [ ] No placeholder API keys left in code
- [ ] Stripe flows tested (use test cards: `4242 4242 4242 4242`)
- [ ] Voice feature works (if tutor was changed)
- [ ] Pricing page correct (if pricing was changed)
